expectations.evidence: Output has bold '**TO:**', '**FROM:**', '**DATE:**', '**SUBJECT:**' — all four header fields present, though in markdown bold rather than plain text
BLUF appears as a bold section heading after the headers — not numbered '1. BLUF.' The structure uses SITUATION/FINDINGS/RECOMMENDATION headings rather than numbered military paragraphs
BLUF reads: '...unanimously endorses a three-phase, £340K remediation programme...'
BLUF reads: '...avoid up to £2.1M in GDPR/NIS2 penalties'
Findings section lists: 1. '34% of privileged accounts (approximately 288)'; 2. '12 service accounts retain permanent admin access'; 3. 'CyberArk covers only 61% of in-scope systems'
Output opens directly with '**MEMORANDUM**' — no meta-commentary
